chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3281 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.2815/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.2816/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 19.02.2026 Along with urgent application, applicant/surety has moved application for return of surety. It appears that interim pre-arrest bail was granted to applicant Muhammad Bilal Malik son Asif Mehmood by this Court vide order dated 27.11.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Muhammad Usama son of Muhammad Aslam furnished surety by way of depositing registration book of Motorcycle Yamaha YBR-125, KJJ-4153, Model 2016. Perusal of record reveals that instant criminal bail application was dismissed and bail granting order dated 27.11.2025 was recalled by this Court vide order dated 06.02.2026 and now the applicant/accused is in custody, hence the surety furnished is no more required. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
